room.caption: [WarshipZ_A]
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(99) background_visible[1]=1; background_visible[2]=1 background_alpha[1]=0.04; background_alpha[2]=0.04 global.rbSwitchBlueOn=false
global.partySplit=0 abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2; global.hasShoes[1]=2 global.canCharSwap=2; global.canDoubleJump=2 global.hasAbilToken[0]=2
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1016) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: talker="Warmaster Log 0001" stringToShow="I hear voices, but where are they coming from? It asks for my assistance.#If I refuse, it continues.#If I inquire for more, it presents an opportunity. However..." boxSize=3

talker="Warmaster Log 0002" stringToShow="I know where the voice is coming from. A bot from the Vault. I thought that wasn't possible. Nothing should be able to reach out and influence the world outside. Do I accept its offer? A bot this powerful could be an asset, however..." boxSize=3
spriteUseN=sWS_LightBall shootTimeN=15 shootDelayN=30 atkPowerN=12 dirN=270 bulletSpeedN=4
